mapper.sql: id, real_name, student_num, admission_year, graduation_year, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delflag
mapper.select:
select s.id, s.real_name as realName, s.student_num as studentNum, concat(ifnull(eu.grade_year, ''), ifnull(eu.name, '')) as className, concat(ifnull(b.room_num, ''), ifnull(r.room_num, '')) as roomName, s.admission_year as admissionYear, s.graduation_year as graduationYear from user_student s left join class_student cs on cs.student_id = s.id and cs.is_current = 1 left join education eu on eu.id = cs.class_id and eu.delflag = 0 left join room_student rs on rs.student_id = s.id and rs.is_current = 1 left join dormitory r on r.id = rs.room_id and r.delflag = 0 and r.parent_id != '${@cloud.ciky.base.constant.SystemConstants@ROOT_NODE_ID}' left join dormitory b on b.id = r.parent_id and b.delflag = 0 and b.parent_id = '${@cloud.ciky.base.constant.SystemConstants@ROOT_NODE_ID}' where s.delflag = 0
and (s.real_name like concat('%', #{query.keywords}, '%') or s.student_num like concat('%', #{query.keywords}, '%'))
order by s.create_time desc

select s.id as student_id, s.real_name as student_real_name, s.student_num, s.admission_year, s.graduation_year, u.id as user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.real_name as user_real_name, u.user_type, u.phone, u.email from dm_business.user_student s left join dm_system.sys_user u on u.business_user_id = s.id and u.delflag = 0 and u.user_type = ${@cloud.ciky.base.enums.UserTypeEnum@STUDENT.getValue()} where s.id = #{id} and s.delflag = 0

select rs.student_id as studentId, s.real_name as studentName, case when rs.student_id = #{currentStudentId} then true else false end as isCurrentUser, a.bucket as avatarBucket, a.path as avatarPath from dm_business.room_student current_rs inner join dm_business.room_student rs on rs.room_id = current_rs.room_id and rs.is_current = 1 inner join dm_business.user_student s on s.id = rs.student_id and s.delflag = 0 left join dm_system.sys_user u on u.business_user_id = s.id and u.user_type = ${@cloud.ciky.base.enums.UserTypeEnum@STUDENT.getValue()} and u.delflag = 0 left join dm_system.sys_attach a on a.id = u.avatar_attach_id and a.delflag = 0 where current_rs.student_id = #{currentStudentId} and current_rs.is_current = 1 order by rs.start_time asc, rs.create_time asc, rs.student_id asc
